$comment: Allowlist for the E2E test duration flagger (e2e-durations.go, threshold 2s, warn-only). Key format: `<spec file>::<describe chain joined with ' › '>::<test title>`. Per-platform sections because Linux Docker and macOS speeds differ. Every entry needs a reason; adding an entry or keeping a newly-slow test needs David's OK. Dead entries (test gone) are auto-removed on local E2E runs; entries whose test drops well under the budget are reported for review.

macos.accessibility.spec.ts::dark mode::Settin: axe audits every settings section in one test; inherently heavy (3.5s at flagger introduction)
macos.accessibility.spec.ts::light mode::Setti: axe audits every settings section in one test; inherently heavy (3.5s at flagger introduction)
macos.brief-cursor-visibility.spec.ts::Brief v: one test drives many nav + window-resize cycles (2.3s at flagger introduction)
macos.mtp-conflicts.spec.ts::MTP cross-volume: virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead (2.2s at flagger introduction)
virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead (2.3s at flagger introduction)
virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead (2.8s at flagger introduction)
macos.mtp-conflicts.spec.ts::MTP same-volume m: virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead (2.5s at flagger introduction)
virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead (2.8s at flagger introduction)
macos.mtp-copy-preflight-uses-cache.spec.ts::M: virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead (2.3s at flagger introduction)
macos.mtp-delete-no-double-scan.spec.ts::MTP d: virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead (2.3s at flagger introduction)
macos.mtp-same-volume-move-merge.spec.ts::::sa: virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead plus three-way merge assertions (2.3s at flagger introduction)
macos.mtp.spec.ts::MTP cross-storage move::mov: virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead (2.2s at flagger introduction)
macos.mtp.spec.ts::MTP file operations::delete: virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead (2.0s at flagger introduction)
macos.mtp.spec.ts::MTP file operations::moves: virtual MTP per-operation protocol overhead (2.9s at flagger introduction)
macos.mtp.spec.ts::MTP file watching::detects: waits for the real MTP watcher to pick up an external FS change (2.3s at flagger introduction)
macos.mtp.spec.ts::MTP large file transfer::co: 50 MB payload through the virtual MTP protocol (2.3s at flagger introduction)
macos.search-open-in-pane.spec.ts::Search dial: navigates out of and back into the search snapshot volume, two full pane loads (3.2s at flagger introduction)
macos.viewer-wordwrap-persistence.spec.ts::Vie: opens the viewer window twice to assert persistence across sessions (2.3s at flagger introduction)
